name: dotnet-architecture

# .NET Architecture

Use this skill when a request needs architecture guidance that may apply to .NET services or to a mixed-stack system.

## Procedure

1. Identify the layer being discussed: API, application, domain, infrastructure, or integration.
2. Compare framework-level tradeoffs and maintenance cost.
3. Keep the recommendation compatible with the current system boundary.
4. Call out testing and deployment implications.

## Useful Output

- Layering recommendation
- Tradeoffs
- Compatibility notes
- Test impact
